home.heroSubheading: Georgian & European cuisine at the entrance of the Dendrological Park
home.aboutText1: Since 2023, Lounge Antico has been welcoming guests at the entrance of Shekvetili's Dendrological Park. We serve Georgian and European dishes, prepared with fresh ingredients and genuine care.
home.aboutText2: We offer outdoor seating, large parking for buses, excursions and large groups, as well as gaming machines. Families and groups are always warmly welcomed.
home.feature1Desc: Only seasonal, fresh ingredients — with Georgian and European flavours.
home.feature2Desc: Every guest is special. Our team is always ready to serve you.
home.feature3Desc: Monday through Sunday, from noon to midnight.
home.feature4Desc: Shekvetili, Ozurgeti — at the entrance of the Dendrological Park.
home.menuText: Georgian and European dishes with fresh ingredients — grilled meats, pizza, seafood, salads, coffee and beverages.
home.ctaText: Our team is ready to prepare a special evening for you. Book your table now.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: All dishes are prepared with fresh, seasonal ingredients. Prices are in GEL.
menu.allergen: For allergen information please ask our staff. We provide vegetarian and vegan options on request.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Our atmosphere, dishes and unforgettable moments.
